products.name: FX-P22EU-LG (SOFA 557-8)Elegantes skandinavisches Sofa – Feines Leinengewebe, solides Holzgestell & Metallbeine, komfortabel für modernes Wohnen
products.description: Vielseitiges modernes Design – Schlichte Linienführung und neutrale Farbgebung fügen sich mühelos in skandinavische, moderne oder industrielle Wohnräume ein. Ergonomische Sitztiefe– Mit einer Sitztiefe von 136 cm optimal proportioniert, ideal zum Lesen, Plaudern oder Entspannen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Elevate your living space with our meticulously designed sofa, a perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality. Boasting a versatile modern design, its clean, simple lines and neutral color palette effortlessly complement a wide range of interior styles, from Scandinavian minimalism and contemporary modern to industrial chic, ensuring it becomes a seamless and stylish addition to any home.

Product

Designed with your comfort in mind, the sofa features an ergonomically optimized seat depth of 136 cm, providing the ideal balance of support and relaxation. Whether you’re curling up with a good book, engaging in lively conversations with friends, or simply unwinding after a long day, this thoughtfully proportioned seat depth ensures maximum comfort for hours on end.
features: Vielseitiges modernes Design – Schlichte Linienführung und neutrale Farbgebung fügen sich mühelos in skandinavische
moderne oder industrielle Wohnräume ein.
Ergonomische Sitztiefe– Mit einer Sitztiefe von 136 cm optimal proportioniert
ideal zum Lesen
Plaudern oder Entspannen.
Breite Armlehnen– Ca. 19 cm breite Armlehnen bieten komfortable Unterstützung für Arme oder Kissen und erhöhen das Entspannungserlebnis.
Klassische Nietenverzierung– Die Vorderseite der Armlehnen ist mit Metallnieten verziert
für feine Details und einen hochwertigen Look

products.name: L-förmiges Ecksofa – 4-Sitzer Sofa, 256.5 x 133.5 x 89 cm, Klassisches Corduroy, Stabilere Kunststoffbeine, Modulares Design, inklusive 6 Kissen, Ideal für Wohnzimmer, Apartments und Büros, Beige
products.description: 【Klassisches Corduroy & Hohe Rückfederung】Das Sofa ist mit klassischem Corduroy bezogen, der hautfreundlich und strapazierfähig ist – auch bei langem Sitzen bleibt es angenehm im Griff und frei von unangenehmer Feuchtigkeit. Die Innenfüllung aus hochelastischem Schaumstoff gewährleistet starke Unterstützung und schnelle Rückfederung, verhindert ein Einfallen selbst nach langjähriger Nutzung. So bleibt der Sitzkomfort langanhaltend und das Sofa behält ihre Form. 【Umwandelbare Chaiselongue-Seite】Die L-förmige Struktur ermöglicht die flexible Umstellung der Chaiselongue-Seite nach linker oder rechter Richtung. Passen Sie sie an Ihre Raumgröße und Nutzungspräferenz an – egal, ob Sie es als entspannenden Liegebereich oder zusätzlichen Sitzplatz nutzen, optimieren Sie den Raumaufbau flexibel.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the perfect blend of comfort, versatility, and durability with our exquisite L-shaped sofa, designed to elevate your living space and cater to all your relaxation needs. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this sofa seamlessly combines classic aesthetics with modern functionality, making it an ideal addition to any home or office.

Product

Wrapped in premium classic corduroy fabric, the sofa offers a luxuriously soft and skin-friendly touch that feels gentle against your skin. Not only does this material exude timeless charm, but it also boasts exceptional durability—even after prolonged use, it maintains a comfortably grippy texture, ensuring you stay cozy without the discomfort of moisture buildup. Beneath the surface, the sofa is filled with high-resilience elastic foam that delivers robust support and rapid recovery, preventing sagging and ensuring the seating remains plush and inviting for years to come. Say goodbye to lumpy cushions and hello to long-lasting comfort that retains its shape, no matter how often you relax on it.

products.description: Flexible Anpassung für jede WohnsituationDiese 3-Sitzer-Schlafsofa bietet maximale Flexibilität: Die Position der Ottomane und des Bettteils kann einfach gewechselt werden, um sich ideal Ihrer Raumaufteilung anzupassen. Introducing our versatile 3-seater sofa bed, the ultimate solution for maximizing flexibility in any living situation. Designed to seamlessly adapt to your unique room layout, this sofa bed allows you to effortlessly swap the positions of the ottoman and bed part, ensuring it fits perfectly into any floor plan—whether you have a compact studio, a cozy apartment, or a spacious living room. It’s not just a piece of furniture; it’s a practical asset that grows with your changing needs, making it ideal for both everyday use and accommodating guests.

Product

Crafted for comfort and style, this sofa features high-quality, soft velvet fabric that adds a touch of elegance to any space. The luxurious material feels incredibly pleasant to the touch, inviting you to unwind after a long day, while its contemporary design blends harmoniously with both modern and classic decor themes. Whether you’re relaxing with a book, hosting friends, or simply enjoying a quiet evening, the sofa ensures first-class comfort that you’ll love coming home to.

products.name: Bequemes Sofa für 2 Personen, kein Zusammenbau erforderlich, flauschiges Sofa mit einem Kissen, Seitentaschen für Fernbedienung und Handy, ordentlich und stilvoll, Beige
products.description: Komfort wie auf Wolken – Unser voll gepolstertes Sofa mit Vakuumkompression sorgt für ein unglaublich weiches Sitzgefühl, das Sie den ganzen Tag genießen können. Perfekt für entspannte Stunden, ohne Kompromisse bei der Bequemlichkeit! Praktische Seitentaschen – Nie wieder nach der Fernbedienung suchen! Mit den praktischen Seitentaschen können Sie Ihr Handy, Ihre Zeitschriften oder andere Dinge griffbereit aufbewahren – ganz bequem und ordentlich.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in cloud-like comfort with our fully padded sofa, expertly crafted with vacuum compression technology to deliver an incredibly soft and luxurious seating experience you’ll never want to leave. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day, binge-watching your favorite shows, or simply enjoying quiet moments, this sofa ensures all-day comfort without any compromise.

Product

Say goodbye to the hassle of searching for misplaced items—our sofa features practical side pockets designed to keep your essentials within arm’s reach. Store your remote control, mobile phone, magazines, or even a cozy throw blanket neatly and conveniently, adding both functionality and organization to your living space.

products.name: Polsterbett Schlafsofa 3 in 1 Multifunktions-Schlafsofa, Leinenstoffsofa mit verstellbarer Rückenlehne, Liegesofa für kleine Räume
products.description: 3-IN-1-UMWANDELBARES DESIGN: Dieses umwandelbare 3-in-1-Schlafsofa bietet maximalen Komfort und Funktionalität und ist die perfekte Lösung für kleine Räume, Gästezimmer und Heimbüros. Dieses Schlafsofa wurde speziell für Ihre Bedürfnisse entwickelt und lässt sich problemlos in ein bequemes Sofa, einen Loungesessel und ein Einzelbett verwandeln. So haben Sie die Flexibilität, sich zu entspannen, zu arbeiten oder zu schlafen. Hochwertiger Leinenstoff: Dieses Schlafsofa ist aus Leinenstoff gefertigt, der eine atmungsaktive, weiche und elegante Textur hat, die zu jeder Einrichtung passt. Das mitgelieferte Kissen sorgt für zusätzlichen Komfort, egal ob Sie es als Kopfstütze im Liegen oder als Lordosenstütze im Sitzen verwenden.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our versatile 3-IN-1 Convertible Sleeper Sofa, the ultimate solution for maximizing comfort and functionality in small spaces, guest rooms, and home offices. This thoughtfully designed piece seamlessly transitions between three essential modes to adapt to your every need: a comfortable sofa for daily relaxation, a lounge chair for focused work or casual reading, and a single bed for overnight guests. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day, tackling tasks, or hosting friends, this sofa offers the flexibility to transform your space effortlessly.

Product

Crafted with high-quality linen fabric, this sofa bed boasts a breathable, soft, and elegant texture that complements any decor style—from modern minimalist to cozy traditional. The included matching pillow adds an extra layer of comfort, serving as a supportive headrest when lying down or a lumbar cushion for added back support during extended sitting. Beneath its stylish exterior, a sturdy frame and premium padding ensure long-lasting durability, while the impressive weight capacity of up to 200KG guarantees stability for daily use.

products.description: · Modulares Design: Das Sofa besteht aus zwei Modulen – einem Zweisitzer und einer Chaiselongue, die flexibel nach Belieben links oder rechts angeordnet werden können. Dadurch passt es sich perfekt an verschiedene Raumkonfigurationen an. · Bequeme Polsterung: Mit weichen, komfortablen Polstern sorgt das Sofa für ein angenehmes Sitzgefühl. Es bietet ausgezeichneten Komfort für lange Entspannungsphasen, sei es zum Sitzen oder Liegen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Discover the perfect blend of versatility, comfort, and durability with our modular sofa, designed to elevate your living space. This thoughtfully crafted piece features a flexible two-module design, consisting of a two-seater section and a chaise longue, allowing you to effortlessly arrange the chaise on either the left or right side to suit your room’s layout. Whether you have a compact apartment, a cozy living room, or a busy office, this sofa adapts seamlessly to various configurations, maximizing both style and functionality.

Product

Sink into unparalleled comfort with its soft, plush cushions that cradle your body, providing a truly relaxing experience whether you’re sitting back to read a book, watching your favorite show, or even taking a quick nap. The generous padding ensures long-lasting comfort, making it ideal for extended periods of relaxation—no more sacrificing comfort for style.

products.description: Kompakt und komfortabel– Das 172 cm breite Zweisitzer-Sofa ist platzsparend und ideal für Apartments oder Single-Wohnungen, bietet dabei dennoch ausreichend Platz zum Entspannen für zwei Personen. Introducing our versatile two-seater sofa, a perfect blend of space-saving design and exceptional comfort, tailored for modern living. Measuring 172 cm in width, this compact yet generously sized sofa is an ideal choice for apartments, studio flats, or single-person dwellings, offering ample room for two people to relax, unwind, or even stretch out after a long day.

Product

Crafted with high-quality 100% polyester fine linen fabric, the sofa not only boasts a luxuriously soft touch but also delivers impressive breathability, ensuring you stay cool and comfortable during extended seating. Its durable construction stands up to daily use, while the easy-care material simplifies maintenance—simply wipe clean or spot treat to keep it looking fresh and new for years to come.

Transform your living space with our versatile 2-in-1 Sofa Bed, the ultimate solution for small apartments, dormitories, or any home in need of flexible furniture. This multi-functional piece seamlessly transitions between sofa and bed modes to adapt to your daily needs—simply fold down the backrest to create a spacious 215×81.5 cm sleeping area, perfect for accommodating overnight guests or providing a cozy spot for afternoon naps.

Product

Designed for personalized comfort, the sofa features double adjustable backrests and multi-stage armrests that cater to every seating preference. Both sides of the backrest can be tilted separately, with 3-stage reclining positions to choose from, while the 6-stage armrests offer customizable support for sitting, leaning, or lying down. Whether you’re reading, watching TV, or relaxing with friends, you’ll find the ideal angle for maximum relaxation.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our innovative 3-in-1 Multifunctional Furniture, the ultimate solution for maximizing flexibility and optimizing space in your home. This highly versatile piece seamlessly transitions between three essential functions to adapt to your daily needs: a cozy couch for lounging with family and friends, a relaxing lounger for unwinding with a book or your favorite show, and a spacious guest bed to accommodate overnight visitors. Whether you live in a compact apartment, a small studio, or simply want to make the most of your living space, this furniture is designed to be the ideal space-saving addition, proving that functionality and comfort can go hand in hand even in smaller rooms.

Product

What truly sets this piece apart is its 5-level adjustable backrest, engineered to deliver customized comfort for every moment of your day. With five practical adjustment positions (approximately 90°, 105°, 120°, 135°, and 180°), you can easily find the perfect angle for any activity. Sit upright at 90° for focused work or meals, lean back to 105° or 120° for relaxed reading or TV viewing, unwind at 135° for casual lounging, or lay flat at 180° for a restful night’s sleep—ensuring you’re always supported exactly how you need.

Introducing our versatile and innovative multifunctional sofa, designed to transform your living room into a personalized haven of comfort and flexibility! This exceptional piece of furniture combines thoughtful engineering with premium materials to deliver an unparalleled relaxation experience for you and your family.

Product

The star feature of this sofa lies in its **adjustable backrest system**, which offers not one, but two layers of customization. First, the main backrest can be effortlessly adjusted to three distinct angles—108°, 135°, and 180°—catering to every activity on your agenda. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite TV show, diving into a gaming session, or stretching out for a quick nap, you can easily find the perfect angle to support your body and enhance comfort. But that’s not all: the sofa also boasts an **innovative split design with independently adjustable left and right backrests**. This means you and your family members can each set your own "exclusive comfort angle" based on personal sitting habits or space needs—no more compromising! Whether someone prefers a upright position for reading or a reclined one for unwinding, everyone gets to enjoy their ideal setup, creating a dynamic and flexible relaxation space in your living room.

Product

Introducing our versatile and stylish Cloud Sofa, a perfect blend of functionality, comfort, and elegance designed to elevate your living space. With its innovative "Buy 1 Sofa, Get 2 Designs" feature, this sofa offers unparalleled versatility. Assembling it is incredibly easy, thanks to the removable frilled skirts for both the sofa and ottoman. Simply attach the frills to infuse your decor with a touch of elegance, or remove them to transform the piece into a sleek mid-century or transitional style sofa—equivalent to owning two distinct designs in one!

Product

Comfort takes center stage with our thoughtfully engineered design. The segmented backrest, paired with high-density foam padding, conforms perfectly to your body curves, delivering comprehensive support whether you’re sitting for hours or leaning back to relax. Included is a movable pillow that adds extra support, doubling as a lumbar or neck pillow and adjusting flexibly to your preferred sitting position, ensuring maximum comfort tailored to your needs.

Crafted with a sleek, modern aesthetic, this modular sofa features flexible design configurations that adapt seamlessly to your unique needs, making it the perfect addition to any home. Whether you’re furnishing a cozy apartment, a spacious living room, a bedroom retreat, or even a children’s playroom, its adaptable structure maximizes space when placed against the wall, turning every corner into a functional and inviting area.

Product

Designed for customizable comfort, this living room combination includes two unique components that let you create your ideal setup—arrange them to fit your space, whether you prefer a corner configuration for relaxation or a linear layout for entertaining. But the luxury doesn’t stop there: our Cozy Shields technology ensures incomparable softness and warmth, wrapping you in a cloud-like embrace every time you sit down. The sofa’s reliable, fail-safe construction stands up to daily use, while its range of vibrant colors adds a special style and lasting charm to any decor, making it easy to match your existing furniture or refresh your space with a new look.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Elevate your living space with our exquisitely designed modular sofa, a perfect blend of style, comfort, and versatility. Crafted from soft, durable, and elegantly vintage chenille fabric, this sofa not only adds a touch of timeless sophistication to your home but also ensures year-round comfort and pleasant seating enjoyment. The standout feature is its exquisite round padded armrests, which not only serve as a unique and trendy furnishing element for your living room but also provide exceptional functionality. Thanks to the high-quality padding, these armrests offer comfortable support for your arms during daily use and can even double as an ergonomic headrest with optimal curvature and hold when you want to relax, read, or unwind.

Product

Sink into unparalleled comfort with our "sitting on a cloud" experience. The cloud-look seat cushions are ingeniously designed without springs or wood inside, instead filled with high-elastic foam and fiber filling to deliver excellent support and elasticity for your body. The deep seat offers additional support for your waist, while the included decorative cushions and lumbar cushions provide extra comfort, ensuring your backrest adjusts and supports you perfectly whether you’re watching TV, reading, or engaging in family conversations.

products.name: Kompakt-Sofa aus Cord – Weich, modular & alltagstauglich mit Seitentasche und Getränkehalter. Hochwertiger Komfort für langes Sitzen, inkl. 3Kissen. Ideal für Wohnzimmer, Arbeitszimmer & mehr.DarkGray
products.description: Das Sofa ist aus grob geripptem Cordstoff gefertigt und vereint ein klassisch-retroes Aussehen mit einer weichen, hautfreundlichen Haptik. Dieses Material ist nicht nur robust und langlebig, sondern passt nahtlos zu verschiedenen Einrichtungsstilen – von modern-minimalistisch bis ländlich-lässig. Die feste, standfeste Faserstruktur sorgt für ein warmes und geborgenes Sitz- und Liegegefühl und schafft so entspannte Momente der Erholung. Flexibles DIY-Kombinationssystem: Das Kompaktsofa bietet völlige Freiheit bei der Gestaltung! Du kannst die Module nach deinen Wünschen und dem Raumumfang kombinieren – ob als einzelnes Sofa, Loveseat oder große Sitzgruppe. Perfekt für kleine Wohnungen oder für diejenigen, die gerne ihre Einrichtung regelmäßig umgestalten, ohne auf Komfort verzichten zu müssen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality with our versatile sofa, designed to elevate your living space in every way. Crafted from coarsely ribbed corduroy, this sofa boasts a classic retro aesthetic paired with an incredibly soft, skin-friendly texture that invites you to sink in and unwind. The durable, long-lasting material not only stands up to daily use but also seamlessly complements a wide range of interior styles—from sleek modern-minimalist to cozy country-casual, making it a timeless addition to any home. Its firm, stable fiber structure ensures a warm and cozy seating and lying experience, creating the ideal spot for relaxed moments of rest, whether you’re curling up with a book or enjoying a lazy afternoon nap.

Product

What truly sets this sofa apart is its flexible DIY combination system, offering complete design freedom to suit your unique needs. The compact modules can be effortlessly arranged according to your preferences and room size—configure it as a single sofa for intimate spaces, a loveseat for couples, or expand it into a large seating group for gatherings. This adaptability makes it perfect for small apartments where space is precious, as well as for those who love rearranging their furnishings regularly without sacrificing an ounce of comfort.

Product

Introducing our versatile and innovatively designed multifunctional sofa, crafted to elevate your living room relaxation experience to new heights. This exceptional piece of furniture seamlessly combines functionality, comfort, and stability to cater to all your daily needs.

Product

The star feature of this sofa lies in its **adjustable backrest system**, which offers not one, but two layers of customization. First, the backrest can be effortlessly adjusted to three distinct angles: 108°, 135°, and 180°, allowing you to switch between activities with ease. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite TV show, diving into a gaming session, or settling in for a cozy nap, there’s a perfect angle to support your posture and maximize comfort. But that’s not all—thanks to its **innovative split design**, the left and right backrests can be adjusted independently. This means you and your family members can each set your own exclusive comfort angle, tailored to your unique sitting habits and space requirements. No more compromising—create a flexible, personalized relaxation zone where everyone feels right at home.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in lasting comfort with our frameless sofa, expertly crafted to transform your living space into a haven of relaxation. At its core, high-density foam filling, paired with spring covers, delivers a cloud-like softness that cradles your body while maintaining stable support, ensuring you can unwind for hours without compromising on comfort. The frameless design not only adds a modern, sleek touch to your decor but also contributes to the sofa’s ability to preserve its perfect shape over time, making it ideal for both daily lounging and long reading sessions.

Product

Designed with your convenience in mind, this sofa requires no installation—simply unbox and let it work its magic. Upon opening the package, the sofa will naturally expand and return to its original state within 72 hours. For even faster recovery, gently tapping the surface (no tools needed!) helps speed up the expansion process, ensuring you can enjoy its full comfort sooner. To achieve the optimal level of softness and support, we recommend waiting the full 72 hours before use, allowing the foam to fully settle into its natural shape.

The connectable ottoman extends leg support, creating a versatile relaxation area where every spot feels like your personal retreat.

Experience unparalleled comfort and style with our premium sofa, meticulously crafted to elevate your living space. At its core lies high resilience foam, engineered using high-density materials that expertly retain their shape, delivering a perfect balance of softness and support for your back and hips. Whether you're unwinding after a long day or hosting guests, this foam ensures lasting comfort that stands the test of time. Wrapped in luxury raindrop velvet, the sofa boasts a smooth, silky texture that feels gentle against the skin, offering a rejuvenating touch while promoting breathability for year-round comfort—no more overheating in summer or feeling too cold in winter.

Product

Designed with your well-being in mind, the ergonomic construction features scientifically optimized backrest height and seat depth, working in harmony to support your body’s natural curves and reduce fatigue during extended sitting sessions. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite shows or tackling work from home, this sofa provides the support you need to stay comfortable and focused. Plus, assembly is a breeze: shipped in a compressed package, it expands immediately upon unpacking, so you can enjoy your new furniture right away without any tools or complicated instructions.

Darüber hinaus sorgt die obere Schicht aus gepolsterten Kissen für zusätzlichen Komfort. [Nackenkissen-Design] Dieses Cordsofa wird mit drei Kissen , und hinter jedem Kissen kann ein Nackenkissen angebracht werden. Wenn Sie sich in die Liegeposition begeben, bieten Ihnen die Nackenkissen ausreichend Halt. Darüber hinaus sorgen die Nackenkissen und Kissen in Kombination auch für zusätzlichen Halt, wenn Sie sich auf das Sofa lehnen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the ultimate combination of comfort, style, and convenience with our premium corduroy sofa, designed to transform your living space into a cozy retreat. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this sofa features a double-padded construction that sets it apart from ordinary seating options. The lower layer is made of highly elastic foam, providing a sturdy and supportive base, while the upper layer is topped with plush padded cushions, elevating both the sofa’s elegance and your seating experience. This thoughtful design not only enhances the sofa’s overall aesthetic appeal but also ensures exceptional comfort with every sit.

Product

Adding to its comfort quotient, the top cushions are filled with slow-rebound high-density foam particles. As you settle into the sofa, these particles adapt to your body’s contours, offering an increasingly soft and personalized feel that cradles you in relaxation. Whether you’re enjoying a movie night or unwinding after a long day, the foam particles work to relieve pressure, making every moment on the sofa a truly luxurious one.

products.description: Exquisites stilvolles Design - Gefertigt aus weichem, strapazierfähigem und sehr elegantem Vintage-Samt, bietet ganzjährig Komfort und weiches Sitzvergnügen. Exquisite runde Polster-Armlehnen im Designer-Stil verleihen Ihrem Wohnzimmer eine einzigartige und modische Dekoration. Mit hochwertiger Füllung in den Polstern bieten sie komfortable Stütze für die Arme, während die Polster-Armlehnen im Sitzen auch Ihrem Kopf die passende Wölbung und Unterstützung geben. Wie auf einer Wolke sitzen - Cloud-Look Sitzkissen ohne Federn oder Holz im Inneren bieten hervorragende Stütze und Elastizität für Ihren Körper. Der tiefe Sitz bietet zusätzliche Unterstützung und Komfort für die Taille. Mit Dekokissen und Lendenkissen erhalten Sie zusätzlichen Halt. Sie können sich hinsetzen und spüren, wie sich die Sofa-Rückenlehne perfekt anpasst und stützt, während Sie unvergleichlichen Komfort genießen.

products.description: Multifunktionales Ecksofa: Dieses multifunktionale Design-Sofa bietet sowohl Freizeit- als auch Schlaffunktionen. Die Maße betragen 191,5 cm x 130,5 cm x 80 cm. Es verfügt über eine flexible L-förmige Eckstruktur und die Chaiselongue kann links und rechts ausgetauscht werden, sodass es sich leicht an verschiedene Wohnraumaufteilungen anpassen lässt. Geteiltes Design: Durch das geteilte Rückenlehnendesign können die Winkel der linken und rechten Rückenlehne unabhängig voneinander eingestellt werden, sodass jedes Familienmitglied entsprechend seinen eigenen Gewohnheiten und Platzanforderungen die bequemste Freizeithaltung finden kann.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our versatile Multifunctional Corner Sofa, the perfect blend of style and practicality to elevate your living space. This thoughtfully designed sofa seamlessly combines leisure and sleeping functions, making it an ideal choice for both daily relaxation and accommodating overnight guests. Measuring 191.5 cm x 130.5 cm x 80 cm, it offers ample space without overwhelming your room, while its flexible L-shaped corner structure ensures it can easily adapt to various living space layouts—simply swap the chaise longue to the left or right to suit your specific arrangement needs.

Product

Designed with your comfort in mind, the sofa features a split backrest design that allows the angles of the left and right backrests to be adjusted independently. This means every family member can customize their seating experience, finding the most comfortable position tailored to their habits and preferences, whether they’re curling up with a book, watching a movie, or engaging in casual conversation.

Adding a touch of elegance, pearl-like piping adorns the edges, elevating its aesthetic to complement any modern living room decor.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our versatile 3-in-1 Multifunctional Sofa – the ultimate solution for maximizing space and comfort in your living area! This innovative piece seamlessly transitions between three practical modes to suit your every need. Use it as a standalone chair for cozy reading sessions, adjust the backrest to one of three tilt angles (105°, 140°, and 180°) to create a personalized reclining sofa perfect for movie nights or relaxation, or effortlessly pull out the hidden bed to transform it into a comfortable sleeper sofa, ideal for accommodating overnight guests.

Product

Crafted with your comfort in mind, this sofa features high-quality foam padding that delivers a plush, supportive seating experience. The soft, durable upholstery not only feels luxurious to the touch but also ensures long-lasting use, while the sturdy frame provides reliable stability. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or hosting friends, you’ll appreciate the optimal balance of softness and firmness that keeps you comfortable for hours.

Zusätzliche Stauraum und einfache Montage: Eine seitliche Tasche an der Armlehne bietet Platz für Fernbedienungen oder Zeitschriften; die Montage ist dank der mitgelieferten Anleitung schnell und unkompliziert.

Ob im Sitzen zum Relaxen oder im Liegen zum Ausruhen – das Sofa bietet stets ein warmes und behagliches Komfortgefühl. Product

Introducing our versatile and comfortable armchair that seamlessly combines style, functionality, and durability to enhance your living space. Designed with your ultimate comfort in mind, this armchair features a luxurious velvet-look breathable fabric that feels soft against the skin while ensuring excellent airflow, preventing overheating even during extended use. The thick padding throughout the seat and backrest, paired with a firm backrest and spring core in the seat, delivers optimal support for your body, allowing you to relax in absolute comfort whether you're reading, watching TV, or unwinding after a long day.

Product

One of the standout features of this armchair is its individually adjustable backrest, which offers a 6-way adjustment with a convenient reclining function that can be set to a maximum of 180°, transforming it into a cozy bed for unexpected guests or a perfect spot for a quick nap. Whether you're hosting sociable evenings with friends, enjoying a quiet night in, or simply need a versatile seating option that adapts to your mood, this folding chair with reclining function effortlessly meets your needs, providing incomparable comfort in every position.

Product

Introducing our versatile foldable sofa, designed to elevate your living space with both comfort and functionality. One of its standout features is the adjustable backrest, which offers five different levels of adjustment, allowing you to recline up to 180 degrees. This means you can easily switch between various sitting and lying positions, making it perfect for relaxation, taking a quick nap, or unwinding after a long and stressful day. Whether you want to sit upright and read a book, lean back to watch your favorite show, or fully extend it for a restful sleep, this sofa adapts to your every need.

Product

When it comes to dimensions, this sofa bed is designed to fit seamlessly into any room while providing ample space. As a small sofa, it measures 120 cm in width, 75 cm in depth, and 87 cm in height, making it suitable for smaller living areas without compromising on comfort. When transformed into a bed, it offers a generous sleeping surface of 190 cm in length and 120 cm in width, with a height of 28 cm, ensuring a comfortable night's sleep for you or your guests. Additionally, it has a strong load capacity of 220 kg, providing stability and durability for everyday use. Please note that some assembly is required, but with the included instructions, you'll have your new sofa ready to enjoy in no time. Experience the ultimate combination of style, comfort, and practicality with this foldable sofa bed today!

The smooth lines outline its contour, abandoning complex decorations and fully demonstrating its neatness and generosity. This sofa is extremely easy to install. There is no need for professional tools or complicated procedures. All you have to do is simply assemble and fix it according to the instructions. Even a novice in home furnishings can complete the installation smoothly in a short time. products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the perfect blend of style, comfort, and durability with our exquisite sofa, meticulously crafted to elevate your living space. Wrapped in premium corduroy fabric, this sofa boasts a thick, sumptuously soft texture that feels incredibly comfortable to the touch while offering exceptional breathability, ensuring you stay cool and cozy even during extended relaxation sessions. The overall design exudes timeless elegance with its simple yet sophisticated silhouette—smooth, flowing lines artfully outline its contour, intentionally abandoning overly complex decorations to showcase a clean, neat, and generously proportioned aesthetic that seamlessly complements any interior décor, from modern minimalist to classic charm.

Product

Beyond its striking appearance, this sofa is engineered for hassle-free setup, making it ideal for both seasoned home decorators and complete novices. Say goodbye to the need for professional tools or confusing procedures—each component is designed for precise, straightforward assembly. Simply follow the clear, step-by-step installation guide, and you’ll have your new sofa ready in no time, transforming your living room, study, or any space into a warm, inviting haven. The thoughtful design ensures every part fits together flawlessly, so you can enjoy your new furniture without the stress of complicated setup.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the ultimate relaxation experience with our exquisitely designed sofa, crafted to deliver unparalleled softness and comfort for your daily living space. At the heart of its exceptional comfort is the thoughtfully engineered segmented backrest, which works in harmony with the high-density foam padding to cradle your body in perfect alignment. Whether you're unwinding after a long day, enjoying a movie marathon, or simply spending quality time with family, this sofa conforms seamlessly to your body curves, providing comprehensive support to your back, shoulders, and neck even during extended sitting or leaning sessions.

Product

Adding to its versatility is the included movable cushion, a practical and thoughtful addition that elevates your comfort to new heights. This soft, supportive cushion can be easily adjusted to suit your specific needs—use it as a lumbar pillow to relieve lower back strain during long hours of sitting, or position it as a neck pillow for extra support when leaning back to read or nap. Its flexible design allows you to customize your sitting position, ensuring that you always find the perfect angle for relaxation.

products.description: 【Wolkenähnlicher Komfort & Tiefsitz-Unterstützung】Sinken Sie in unser boneless Sofa ein! Premium-32D-Schaum bietet sofortige Weichheit und dauerhafte Unterstützung für ein echtes Cloud-Couch-Gefühl. Die geschwungene Rückenlehne und der 74cm Tiefsitz umschließen Ihren Körper in perfekter Haltung für maximalen Komfort. Ideal für Filmabende oder Nickerchen – dieses vielseitige modulare Sofa für das Wohnzimmer bringt wolkenähnlichen Komfort und schafft Ihren persönlichen Entspannungsbereich. 【Weicher & Haustierfreundlicher Cordstoff】Genießen Sie unser Cordsofa, umhüllt von samtweichem, atmungsaktivem Stoff, der sowohl luxuriös als auch robust ist. Dieses modulare Sofa widersteht problemlos Kratzern von Haustieren – mit kratzfestem, leicht zu reinigendem Material für vollständige Sorgenfreiheit. Mit perlenähnlicher Paspel veredelt, ist es ein stilvolles und zugleich praktisches Sofa für das W
products.detailHtml:
Product

Sink into unparalleled comfort with our boneless sofa, designed to transform your living space into a personal relaxation haven. Experience the ultimate "cloud-like" sensation as you settle into premium 32D foam, which delivers instant softness while ensuring long-lasting support—perfect for those moments when you want to truly unwind. The thoughtfully crafted curved backrest and generous 74cm deep seat work in harmony to cradle your body, promoting optimal posture and maximum coziness whether you’re enjoying a movie night, diving into a good book, or simply taking a rejuvenating nap.

Product

Safety and practicality take center stage in this minimalist design, making it ideal for active households. The non-slip base ensures the sofa stays securely in place, even with playful children or energetic pets exploring around. Its low-to-the-ground profile adds a modern touch, while the extra-wide armrests offer both a comfortable spot to rest your arms and a safe surface for placing drinks, snacks, or your favorite decor.

Sink into the velvety embrace of our premium corduroy upholstery, where luxurious softness meets remarkable durability. The breathable fabric not only feels gentle against the skin but also stands up to the rigors of daily life—especially in homes with furry friends. Engineered to resist pet scratches, this sofa ensures worry-free cohabitation, while its easy-to-clean material simplifies maintenance, letting you focus on relaxation rather than upkeep. Adding a touch of sophistication, elegant pearl-like piping adorns the edges, blending timeless charm with everyday functionality to create a sofa that is as visually appealing as it is comfortable.

Introducing our versatile and stylish seating solution, designed to elevate your living experience with a perfect blend of functionality and comfort. This exceptional piece features a 360° free and smooth rotation mechanism, paired with a stable metal base, allowing you to gently swivel in any direction with ease. Boasting an impressive load capacity of 136 kg, it ensures reliable support for daily use. Whether you want to face the TV, soak up the sun by the window, or engage in lively conversations without moving the entire chair, this rotation feature offers unparalleled convenience, making it an ideal choice for small living spaces where flexibility is key.

Product

Crafted from high-quality Hauchzweiches Chenille fabric, this chair prioritizes your comfort and well-being. The material is not only skin-friendly but also highly breathable, making it suitable even for those with sensitive skin, ensuring a comfortable seating experience year-round. Cleaning is a breeze too—simply wipe away spills and dirt with a damp cloth, saving you valuable time and effort in maintenance.

products.detailHtml:
Product

【Buy 1 Sofa, Get 2 Designs & Diverse Flexible Combinations】Transform your living space with our versatile Cloud Sofa, designed to adapt to your style and needs effortlessly. Assembling this sofa is incredibly easy, and it comes with removable ruffled skirts for both the sofa and ottoman, allowing you to create two distinct looks in an instant. Keep the elegant ruffled skirts attached to add a touch of sophistication to your decor, or remove them to switch to a sleek mid-century or transitional style—perfect for updating your space to match any aesthetic preference.

Product

But the versatility doesn’t stop there. This sofa collection features several independent modules that can be freely combined into various layouts, including an L-shaped sofa for family gatherings, a chaise longue for ultimate relaxation, or even a sleeper sofa for accommodating overnight guests. The included ottoman is a multi-functional star: use it as a footrest, a side table to hold drinks or snacks, or standalone seating when you need extra space. Whether you have a spacious living room or a cozy small living area, this comfortable corner sofa is expertly designed to meet your diverse needs, making it the ideal centerpiece for any home. Experience the perfect blend of style, flexibility, and functionality with our Cloud Sofa—where one purchase brings endless possibilities.

Indulge in unparalleled comfort with our innovative cloud-like sofa, designed to transform your living space into a haven of relaxation. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this sofa features revolutionary Cloud-Look seat cushions that eliminate the need for springs or wood, offering exceptional support and elasticity that gently conform to your body's natural curves. The deep seat design provides additional lumbar support, while the included decorative cushions and lumbar cushions allow you to customize your comfort, ensuring a perfect fit whether you're lounging, reading, or unwinding after a long day. As you settle in, you'll instantly feel how the sofa's backrest adjusts to support your body, creating a seating experience that feels like sitting on a cloud.

Product

At the heart of this sofa's exceptional comfort is its high-quality materials. The seat cushions are filled with a premium blend of highly elastic foam and fiber filling, delivering a soft yet supportive feel that retains its shape even after years of use. This thoughtful construction not only ensures ultimate comfort but also prioritizes safety, giving you peace of mind as you relax. Whether you're binge-watching your favorite TV show, diving into a good book, or sharing stories with family and friends, this sofa offers the ultimate comfort experience that caters to every moment of your day.

Introducing our versatile and stylish Cloud Sofa, designed to elevate your living space with both functionality and elegance. One of the standout features of this sofa is its innovative "Buy 1 Sofa, Get 2 Designs" concept. The sofa and ottoman come with detachable ruffled skirts, making assembly incredibly easy. By simply attaching or removing these skirts, you can instantly transform the look of your sofa, essentially getting two distinct designs in one. Keep the ruffles on to add a touch of sophistication and charm to your decor, or remove them to switch to a sleek mid-century or transitional style that seamlessly blends with various interior aesthetics.

Product

It features a segmented backrest and is padded with high-density foam, which conforms perfectly to your body curves, ensuring comprehensive support even during long hours of sitting or leaning back. Additionally, a movable cushion is included, offering extra body support that can be flexibly adjusted to your sitting position—use it as a lumbar cushion for lower back support or a neck cushion for added comfort, providing personalized relaxation tailored to your needs.

Product

Sink into unparalleled relaxation with our Boneless Cloud Sofa, where cloud-like comfort meets modern functionality to transform your living space into a personal oasis of calm. Designed for both style and practicality, this versatile modular sofa combines premium materials, thoughtful features, and effortless setup to elevate your daily comfort.

Product

**Cloud-like Comfort & Deep-Seat Support**
Experience the sensation of sitting on a cloud with our sofa’s premium 32D foam, engineered to deliver instant softness while maintaining long-lasting support. The 74cm deep seat and gently curved backrest cradle your body in perfect alignment, whether you’re unwinding after a long day, hosting movie nights, or taking a quick nap. Every inch is crafted to wrap you in comfort, making it the ideal centerpiece for your living room relaxation zone.

Product

Indulge in the epitome of comfort with our Cloud Sofa, a masterpiece designed to transform your living space into a haven of relaxation. Crafted with Premium Plush Fabric, this sofa wraps you in luxury—its ultra-soft, cloud-like texture is not only skin-friendly for all ages but also built to last. Unlike stiff alternatives, it retains its velvety softness even with daily use and resists pilling, ensuring a pristine look for years to come.

Product

Designed for the ultimate cozy experience, the sofa features a curved, body-hugging silhouette that naturally conforms to your shape, while the 32D high-resilience foam core rebounds quickly and maintains durability, offering an immediate, cloud-like embrace. The extra-wide, reinforced seat and connectable ottoman extend leg support, effectively reducing pressure and fatigue, so every corner becomes your personal relaxation zone—perfect for lazy afternoons or movie nights.

Experience the ultimate in versatility and luxury with our modular lounge seating collection, designed to transform any space into a personalized haven of comfort and style. The MODULAR ADVANTAGE ensures endless possibilities—whether you’re looking to add a striking accent piece to your living room or create a complete lounge setup with up to five pieces, including a perfectly matching ottoman for added functionality. Mix and match to suit your space, from intimate nooks to expansive entertainment areas, and enjoy the freedom to reconfigure whenever your mood or needs change.

Product

Crafted with LUXURIOUS VELVET UPHOLSTERY, every piece in this collection exudes opulence. The velvet fabric, with its soft, wool-like texture, offers a sumptuously tactile experience that invites you to sink in and relax. Its rich, cosy feel adds a layer of warmth and sophistication to any decor, ensuring the luxurious factor is always front and center—up close and personal for you and your guests to appreciate.

Boasting a classic L-shaped design with a fixed chaise longue on the right side, this sofa measures L206.5 × W141 × H86 cm, offering a generous seating area that comfortably accommodates 4–5 people, making it ideal for family gatherings or entertaining guests in your living room. Please note that the chaise longue is固定 (fixed) on the right and cannot be swapped, ensuring a stable and intentional layout.

Whether you have overnight guests or simply want to relax with a nap, the hidden pull-out design provides a cozy and supportive sleeping space, adding exceptional versatility to your furniture.

Indulge in the ultimate comfort and style with our exquisite armchair, thoughtfully designed to elevate your relaxation experience. Crafted with high-quality, skin-friendly fabric, the surface of this armchair is made from soft, fine-grained teddy velvet that feels incredibly soft and comfortable to the touch. They cradle your back in all the right places, ensuring maximum comfort and reducing strain, making this armchair the perfect spot to escape the stresses of the day.

products.description: [Das Doppelkissen]Die Sofakonstruktion besteht aus einer unteren Schicht aus hochelastischem Schaumstoff und einer oberen Schicht aus gepolsterten Kissen, was dem Sofa insgesamt ein eleganteres Aussehen verleiht. Darüber hinaus sorgt die obere Schicht aus gepolsterten Kissen für zusätzlichen Komfort. Introducing our versatile Modular Sofa Bed, a perfect blend of functionality, flexibility, and modern design to elevate your living space. This innovative sofa features a thoughtfully crafted modular structure consisting of six separate modules, offering you unparalleled freedom to customize your living area. The ottoman stands out as a flexible piece, allowing you to position it freely according to your needs—whether as a footrest, extra seating, or even a small side table. The remaining four modules are securely connected via durable connecting elements, ensuring stability when arranged together, yet they can be easily separated to adapt to any room layout, making it ideal for both compact apartments and spacious living rooms.

Product

What truly sets this sofa apart is its two-in-one design, seamlessly transitioning from a stylish sofa to a comfortable bed. Thanks to its modular configuration, you can transform it into various setups to meet diverse daily requirements. Craving an L-shaped sofa for cozy family movie nights? Or perhaps a U-shaped layout for entertaining guests? With easy adjustments, you can switch between configurations effortlessly, tailoring the sofa to your exact preferences. When unexpected guests arrive, simply convert it into a sofa bed, providing a convenient and comfortable sleeping option that ensures your visitors feel right at home.

This sofa features three levels of golden backrest angles to cater to all your needs throughout the day. The 108° sofa mode provides an upright sitting posture, ensuring no pressure on your back even during long hours of working or reading, allowing you to stay focused and comfortable. For a more immersive entertainment experience, the 135° semi-recline mode offers a cinema-level feel, making it perfect for watching your favorite dramas, movies, or enjoying games with ease. When you need to unwind completely, the 180° full-flat sleeping sofa mode allows you to stretch out and relax deeply, providing a restful spot for a quick nap or a good night's sleep. With these different backrest angles, this sofa effortlessly meets the requirements of various scenarios in your daily life.

Product

Not only does this sofa excel in functionality, but it also boasts a luxurious feel and super support. The cotton fabric used is not only soft and comfortable against the skin but also wrinkle-free, wear-resistant, and pilling-resistant, ensuring it maintains its pristine appearance even with regular use and is suitable for all seasons. The seat cushion is thoughtfully filled with high-elastic sponge and independent pocket springs, which work together to provide excellent support and prevent sagging even after prolonged sitting, so you can enjoy the same level of comfort for years to come. products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the epitome of comfort and sophistication with our exquisite sofa and armchair set, designed to transform your living room into a luxurious retreat. Crafted from high-quality velvet striped fabrics, the sofa boasts unique velvety textures that feel incredibly soft and fluffy to the touch, while the velvety sheen adds an air of opulent elegance, instantly elevating the class and style of your space. Its modern design seamlessly blends with various decor styles, ensuring it becomes the focal point of your living room. What sets this sofa apart is its thoughtful functionality—equipped with replaceable armrests, cushions, and side pillows, you can easily refresh its look to match evolving tastes or seasonal decor, reflecting the beauty of your room's aesthetic.

Product

Complementing the sofa is our cleverly designed armchair, a perfect companion for relaxation. It features two convenient cup holders, allowing you to keep your favorite drink within arm's reach while you unwind. The chair also includes a smart pocket design, providing ample space to store reading books, newspapers, or magazines, ensuring your essentials are always close at hand. For added convenience, the armchair is equipped with a practical charging function located on its side, making it easy to charge your phone, tablet, or other devices while you lounge. The stable storage function further enhances its utility, keeping your space organized and clutter-free. Together, this sofa and armchair set offers a harmonious blend of style, comfort, and functionality, promising a comfortable and cozy leisure exper

Introducing our versatile and elegant sofa, designed to elevate your living space with both functionality and style. The independently adjustable double backrest is a standout feature, allowing each backrest to be adjusted separately into 3 fixed angles – sit upright for focused work, lean back for relaxed reading, or lie completely flat to transform the sofa into a comfortable lying surface in no time. This makes it perfect for various activities, from working from home to unwinding after a long day, and even accommodating overnight guests with ease.

Additionally, its dirt-repellent and colorfast properties mean the sofa will maintain its fresh, vibrant appearance for years to come, making it a practical choice for busy households.

The sofa backrest adjusts naturally to your posture, creating an incomparable sense of comfort that makes every moment spent on it a true delight.

Product

Introducing our versatile 2-in-1 Sofa Bed, the ultimate solution for maximizing space and comfort in small living areas. This innovative piece seamlessly transitions between sofa and bed modes, allowing you to effortlessly switch between a cozy seating arrangement and a spacious sleeping surface. When folded flat, the backrest creates a generous 215×81.5 cm bed, providing ample room for a restful night’s sleep—perfect for apartments, dormitories, or any space where functionality and flexibility are key.

Product

Designed for personalized relaxation, this sofa bed features a double-adjustable backrest and multi-level armrests. Both sides of the backrest can be reclined independently, offering customizable comfort for you and your guests. With 3 adjustable backrest positions and 6-level armrest settings, you can easily find the ideal angle for sitting, leaning, or lying down, whether you’re reading, watching TV, or taking a nap.

products.description: 【Konstruktion】: Modulares L-Form-Design mit 2-Personen-Sitzgruppe und integrierter Chaiselongue-Ecke, das sich flexibel an verschiedene Raumlayouts anpassen lässt – egal ob als zentrales Sitzmöbel im großen Wohnzimmer oder als platzsparende Lösung in kleinen Räumen. Die kombinierbare Struktur bietet maximale Praktikabilität, ermöglicht individuelle Platzierung und lässt sich je nach Nutzungszweck leicht umstellen, um sowohl entspannte Solo-Stunden als auch gemeinsame Familienabende zu begleiten. 【Verpackung】: Vollkomprimierte Vakuumverpackung revolutioniert Transport und Einzug – das Sofa wird platzsparend in einer kompakten Box geliefert, die selbst durch schmale Türen oder enge Aufzüge passt. Ohne aufwändige Hilfsmittel entfaltet sich es innerhalb von Minuten zu einem vollwertigen Sitzmöbel, ideal für Mieter oder Personen, die ohne große Logistikaufwand ein neues Möbelstück einrichten
products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our versatile L-shape modular sofa, designed to elevate your living space with both functionality and style. The construction features a modular L-shape design that includes a 2-person seating group and an integrated chaise longue corner, offering exceptional flexibility to adapt to various room layouts. Whether you have a spacious living room where it can serve as the central seating focal point or a small room where space optimization is key, this sofa seamlessly fits in. Its combinable structure maximizes practicality, allowing for individual placement and easy rearrangement to suit different occasions—perfect for relaxed solo moments or enjoyable shared family evenings.

Product

Transport and setup have never been easier, thanks to our innovative fully compressed vacuum packaging. The sofa arrives in a compact, space-saving box that can effortlessly pass through narrow doors and tight elevators, eliminating the hassle of maneuvering large furniture. What’s more, no elaborate tools are required; it unfolds into a full-fledged seating piece within minutes, making it an ideal choice for renters or anyone looking to set up new furniture without significant logistical effort.

Product

Introducing our versatile modular L-shaped sofa, designed to transform your living space with both style and functionality. This thoughtfully crafted seating solution features a 2-person seating group and an integrated chaise longue corner, offering exceptional flexibility to adapt to any room layout. Whether you have a spacious living room where it can serve as the central seating focal point, or a smaller space where you need a space-saving design, this sofa effortlessly meets your needs. The combinable structure allows for individual placement and easy rearrangement, making it perfect for relaxed solo moments, family gatherings, or entertaining friends.

Product

Transport and setup are a breeze thanks to our fully compressed vacuum packaging. Delivered in a compact, space-saving box, it can easily fit through narrow doors and tight elevators, eliminating the hassle of maneuvering large furniture. No elaborate tools are required—simply unpack, and it unfolds into a full-sized sofa within minutes. This makes it an ideal choice for renters, new homeowners, or anyone looking to set up furniture without major logistical stress.

Product

Introducing our stunning cloud-inspired sofa, a masterpiece that seamlessly blends modern aesthetics with exceptional functionality to elevate your living space. At first glance, its unique cloud-shaped design captivates with curved wave armrests and a semicircular cushion combination, instantly transforming your living room into a sophisticated art focal point that will impress guests and create a serene atmosphere.

Product

Designed for versatility, this sofa features an innovative 3-level adjustment mechanism, allowing you to customize your seating experience to suit any occasion. Whether you need focused productivity in the 105° working mode, relaxed comfort in the 135° relaxation position, or extra space when folded flat to 180° for storage, this sofa adapts effortlessly to your lifestyle.

products.description: Das Sofa ist aus grob geripptem Cordstoff gefertigt und vereint ein klassisch-retroes Aussehen mit einer weichen, hautfreundlichen Haptik. Dieses Material ist nicht nur robust und langlebig, sondern passt nahtlos zu verschiedenen Einrichtungsstilen – von modern-minimalistisch bis ländlich-lässig. Die feste, standfeste Faserstruktur sorgt für ein warmes und geborgenes Sitz- und Liegegefühl und schafft so entspannte Momente der Erholung. Flexibles DIY-Kombinationssystem: Das Kompaktsofa bietet völlige Freiheit bei der Gestaltung! Du kannst die Module nach deinen Wünschen und dem Raumumfang kombinieren – ob als einzelnes Sofa, Loveseat oder große Sitzgruppe. Perfekt für kleine Wohnungen oder für diejenigen, die gerne ihre Einrichtung regelmäßig umgestalten, ohne auf Komfort verzichten zu müssen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the perfect blend of style, comfort, and versatility with our exceptional sofa, designed to elevate your living space in every way. Crafted from coarsely ribbed corduroy, this sofa exudes a classic-retro charm while offering a remarkably soft and skin-friendly texture that invites you to sink in and relax. The durable, long-lasting material ensures years of enjoyment, and its timeless appeal seamlessly complements a wide range of interior styles—whether your home boasts a modern-minimalist aesthetic or a cozy rural-casual vibe. The firm, stable fiber structure not only provides reliable support but also creates a warm and inviting seating and lying experience, making every moment spent on it a true retreat into relaxation.

Product

What truly sets this sofa apart is its flexible DIY combination system, putting you in complete control of your space. The compact modules can be effortlessly mixed and matched according to your preferences and room size, allowing you to create anything from a single sofa for intimate corners to a loveseat for couples or a large seating group for family gatherings. It’s the ideal solution for small apartments where space is precious, as well as for those who love to rearrange their furniture regularly—all without compromising on comfort.

Transform your living space into a haven of versatility and comfort with our Multi-Purpose Modular Sofa – the ultimate solution for dynamic living! This innovative piece seamlessly adapts to your every need, featuring a separate footstool that transforms the 3-seater sofa into a spacious L-shaped chaise longue in seconds. Whether you’re hosting guests, unwinding with a book, or stretching out for a nap, it effortlessly caters to sitting, lying, resting, and leaning – making it the perfect centerpiece for any living room.

Product

Designed for flexibility, our modular free combination system lets you customize your setup with ease. Simply move the footrest and fold the seat cushions to align the L-shaped chaise on the left or right, ensuring a perfect fit for any floor plan, small apartment, or open-concept space. No more compromising on style or functionality – rearrange it to match your mood or room layout whenever inspiration strikes!

products.description: The corduroy fabric used is thick in texture, comfortable to touch and highly breathable. The overall shape of the sofa is simple and elegant. The precise design and considerate installation guide ensure that each component fits perfectly, quickly creating a warm and elegant space for your living room or study.

products.description: Ein Multiform-Sofa ist ein vielseitiges Möbelstück, das sich flexibel an verschiedenste Bedürfnisse anpasst – als Sofa, als Lounge-Sessel oder als Bett. Es wurde für Räume konzipiert, in denen Flexibilität gefragt ist, und bietet unterschiedliche Aufstellungen, die sich an die jeweilige Tages­aktivität anpassen. Der Rahmen des Sofas besteht aus Metall und garantiert so höchste Stabilität, während die Polster aus Schaumstoff für das perfekte Gleichgewicht von Komfort und Stützkraft sorgen. Die Velours-Polsterung verleiht dem Sofa eine edle Optik, die sich nahtlos in jede Wohndekoration einfügt.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our Multiform Sofa, the ultimate solution for modern living spaces that demand flexibility and style. This versatile piece of furniture seamlessly adapts to your ever-changing needs, effortlessly transforming from a comfortable sofa for daily lounging to a cozy lounge chair for relaxed reading sessions, and even a practical bed for overnight guests. Designed with adaptability in mind, it’s perfect for apartments, small living rooms, or any space where maximizing functionality is key, offering a range of configurations to suit your daily activities—whether you’re hosting friends, enjoying a quiet evening, or need an extra sleeping spot.

Product

Crafted for both durability and comfort, the sofa features a robust metal frame that ensures maximum stability, providing a solid foundation that stands up to daily use. The foam cushions strike the perfect balance between plush comfort and reliable support, cradling your body while maintaining their shape over time. Upholstered in premium velour, the sofa exudes an elegant, sophisticated look that seamlessly blends into any living decor—whether your style is modern minimalist, classic, or eclectic. The soft, smooth texture of the velour not only adds a touch of luxury but also enhances the overall comfort experience.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in the ultimate blend of comfort and style with our exquisite chenille sofa, thoughtfully designed to elevate your living space. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this sofa features a unique double cushion construction that sets it apart. The lower layer is built with highly elastic foam, while the upper layer boasts plush padded cushions, working in harmony to not only enhance the sofa's overall elegant appearance but also deliver an unparalleled seating experience. What truly makes this sofa a standout is the top cushion, filled with slow-rebound high-density foam particles that adapt to your body's contours. As you sit, you'll immediately notice the increasingly soft and supportive feel, ensuring every moment spent on it is pure relaxation.

Product

Designed with your comfort in mind, this sofa comes complete with three cushions, each complemented by a detachable neck cushion that can be easily attached behind them. Whether you're lying down to unwind or leaning back to enjoy a movie, the neck cushions provide exceptional support for your neck and shoulders, while the combination of neck cushions and main cushions offers extra stability and comfort during extended periods of use.

products.description: 【Konstruktion】: Modulares L-Form-Design mit 2-Personen-Sitzgruppe und integrierter Chaiselongue-Ecke, das sich flexibel an verschiedene Raumlayouts anpassen lässt – egal ob als zentrales Sitzmöbel im großen Wohnzimmer oder als platzsparende Lösung in kleinen Räumen. Die kombinierbare Struktur bietet maximale Praktikabilität, ermöglicht individuelle Platzierung und lässt sich je nach Nutzungszweck leicht umstellen, um sowohl entspannte Solo-Stunden als auch gemeinsame Familienabende zu begleiten. 【Verpackung】: Vollkomprimierte Vakuumverpackung revolutioniert Transport und Einzug – das Sofa wird platzsparend in einer kompakten Box geliefert, die selbst durch schmale Türen oder enge Aufzüge passt. Ohne aufwändige Hilfsmittel entfaltet sich es innerhalb von Minuten zu einem vollwertigen Sitzmöbel, ideal für Mieter oder Personen, die ohne große Logistikaufwand ein neues Möbelstück einrichten
products.detailHtml:
Product

【Construction】: Modular L-shaped design with a 2-person seating group and integrated chaise longue corner, which can be flexibly adapted to various room layouts – whether as a central piece of seating furniture in a large living room or as a space-saving solution in small rooms. The combinable structure offers maximum practicality, allows individual placement, and can be easily rearranged depending on the intended use to accompany both relaxed solo hours and shared family evenings.
【Packaging】: Fully compressed vacuum packaging revolutionizes transportation and moving – the sofa is delivered in a space-saving, compact box that can even fit through narrow doors or tight elevators. Without the need for elaborate tools, it unfolds into a full-fledged piece of seating furniture within minutes, ideal for renters or people who want to set up a new piece of furniture without significant logistical effort.
【Material】: Made of high-quality, soft corduroy (Manchester fabric) with characteristic vertical ribs, providing a pleasant skin feel and a vintage-warm visual texture. The durable fabric is not only easy to care for and resistant to daily use, but also blends harmoniously into various interior styles – from Scandinavian minimalist to classic-elegant.
【Room Suitability】: Perfectly tailored to the needs of living rooms, rental apartments, and flats – it is suitable for both daily relaxation and occasional guest entertaining. The versatile design seamlessly adapts to different room sizes and furnishing concepts without sacrificing comfort or style, making it an indispensable

Schnell montiert: werkzeugfreier Aufbau in wenigen Minuten – ohne Fachkenntnisse.

products.name: Moderner Chenille-Zweisitzer mit ergonomischem Design, luftdurchlässiger Sitzfläche, verstellbarer Rückenlehne und Armlehnen sowie Metallbeinen für optimalen Komfort und Stabilität.
products.description: Dieses Sofa dient gleichzeitig als Schlafsofa und ist perfekt für den täglichen Gebrauch! Ob zu zweit oder mit Gästen – es ist für jeden Anlass geeignet. Die verstellbare Rückenlehne bietet flexible Anpassungsmöglichkeiten. Verdickter, hochelastischer Schaumstoff bietet Halt, während der staubabweisende Chenille-Stoff pflegeleicht ist. Die Metallbeine sorgen für ein klassisches Design, das perfekt in moderne Wohnräume passt! Ergonomischer Luxus für zu zweit – verstellbare Armlehnen & kuscheliges Chenille!Dieses elegante 2-Personen-Sofa bietet durch individuell einstellbare Arm- und Rückenlehnen optimalen Komfort für jede Körpergröße. Die hochwertige Schaumstoff-Füllung passt sich sanft an, während das strapazierfähige Chenille-Gewebe zum Entspannen einlädt. Die robusten Metallbeine garantieren Stabilität – perfekt für gemütliche Filmabende.

Transform your living space into a haven of comfort, style, and functionality with our exceptional modular sofa, designed to elevate every moment of relaxation and connection. Crafted from high-quality structural corduroy, this sofa boasts a luxuriously soft texture that invites you to sink in, while its elegant appearance adds a touch of modern sophistication to any home decor. The unique corduroy texture not only feels delightful to the touch but also creates a warm, inviting atmosphere, making your living area the perfect place to unwind or entertain.

Product

Designed with both comfort and social interaction in mind, the spacious 3-seater configuration offers ample room for family gatherings, friendly get-togethers, or cozy movie nights. The wide, supportive seats and stable frame ensure maximum comfort, turning this sofa into the ultimate social focal point where everyone can relax and connect. What truly sets this sofa apart is its modular flexibility—each unit can be effortlessly adapted to suit your living situation. Whether you prefer a large corner sofa, a versatile U-shape, or individual seating modules, you have the freedom to design a layout that perfectly fits your room size and personal needs, ensuring a customized look that complements your space.

products.description: Keine Montage erforderlich: Genießen Sie die mühelose Installation dieses Sofasets, das keinerlei Montage erfordert. Lassen Sie das Sofa nach dem Auspacken gemäß den Anweisungen etwa 72 Stunden lang ausdehnen, damit es seine volle Form wiedererlangt. Minimalistisches modulares Sofa-Set: Das moderne modulare L-förmige Sofa zeichnet sich durch einen schlichten Stil aus, der sich auf klare Linien und hochwertigen Cordstoff konzentriert, um Ihrem Zuhause einen zeitlosen und schicken Look zu verleihen und Ihr Wohnzimmer zum Mittelpunkt der Aufmerksamkeit zu machen.

Elevate your living space with our exceptional modular corduroy sofa, a perfect blend of style, comfort, and versatility designed to transform your home into a cozy yet sophisticated haven. Crafted from high-quality structural corduroy, this sofa boasts a luxuriously soft texture that invites you to sink in while exuding an elegant, timeless appearance—effortlessly adding warmth and modern sophistication to any room.

Product

The spacious 3-seater design serves as the heart of your living area, offering ample seating for family gatherings, friendly get-togethers, or relaxed movie nights. With its wide seat surface and sturdy, stable structure, it ensures exceptional comfort and support, making every moment spent lounging a true pleasure. What truly sets this sofa apart is its modular flexibility: the interchangeable units adapt seamlessly to your unique living situation, allowing you to configure it as a large corner sofa, a practical L-shape, or even individual seating modules. Whether you have a compact apartment or a sprawling living room, you have complete freedom to design the sofa that perfectly fits your space and lifestyle.
features: Die hochwertige Struktur-Cordstoff kombiniert eine angenehm weiche Haptik mit einer eleganten Optik. Die einzigartige Textur verleiht Ihrem Wohnraum eine warme
einladende Atmosphäre und bringt gleichzeitig moderne Raffinesse in Ihr Zuhause.
Die großzügige 3-Sitzer-Konstruktion bietet reichlich Platz für Familie
Freunde oder entspannte Filmabende. Durch die breite Sitzfläche und stabile Struktur entsteht ein komfortabler
sozialer Mittelpunkt im Wohnbereich.
Die modularen Einheiten können flexibel an Ihre Wohnsituation angepasst werden – ob als großes Ecksofa
L-Form oder einzelne Sitzmodule. Sie gestalten Ihr Sofa ganz nach Bedarf und Raumgröße.
Der integrierte Cupholder im Armlehnenmodul sorgt dafür

products.name: 104-Inch Corduroy Modular L Shaped Sectional Sofa,Luxury Floor Couch Set,Upholstered Indoor Furniture,Foam-Filled Compressed Sofa for Living Room,Bedroom,4 PCS Free Combination
products.description: Keine Montage erforderlich: Genießen Sie die mühelose Installation dieses Sofasets, das keinerlei Montage erfordert. Lassen Sie das Sofa nach dem Auspacken gemäß den Anweisungen etwa 72 Stunden lang ausdehnen, damit es seine volle Form wiedererlangt. Minimalistisches modulares Sofa-Set: Das moderne modulare L-förmige Sofa zeichnet sich durch einen schlichten Stil aus, der sich auf klare Linien und hochwertigen Cordstoff konzentriert, um Ihrem Zuhause einen zeitlosen und schicken Look zu verleihen und Ihr Wohnzimmer zum Mittelpunkt der Aufmerksamkeit zu machen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Introducing our versatile and stylish Minimalist Modular L-Shaped Sofa Set, designed to elevate your living space with both functionality and timeless elegance. Crafted with a focus on clean lines and premium corduroy fabric, this sofa set brings a modern, sophisticated touch to any home, instantly making your living room the center of attention.

Product

What sets this sofa apart is its effortless setup—**no assembly required**! Simply unpack, and according to the included instructions, allow the sofa to expand for approximately 72 hours to regain its full, plush shape. No tools, no hassle—just quick, easy enjoyment.

products.name: 235CM Minimalistisches Cordsofa mit geschwungenen Linien und einer sanft abfallenden Rückenlehne, komplett mit zwei Kissen.
products.description: Keine Montage erforderlich: Dieses Sofa-Set lässt sich ganz einfach aufstellen und erfordert keinerlei Montage. Nach dem Auspacken lassen Sie das Sofa bitte gemäß den Anweisungen etwa 72 Stunden lang ruhen und bringen Sie die Details des Sofas in Form, indem Sie die Kissen zusammendrücken, damit sie ihre ursprüngliche Form wieder annehmen. Entworfen für das Leben: Mit seinen abgerundeten Kanten und seinem eleganten, einladenden Erscheinungsbild ist dieses luxuriöse Sofa-Set nicht nur ästhetisch ansprechend, sondern auch weich und strapazierfähig und verfügt über extrabreite Sitzflächen. Es ist der perfekte Ort, um Filme zu genießen oder sich mit Familie oder Freunden zu entspannen.
products.detailHtml:
Product

Transform your living space with our exquisite modular sofa set, designed to seamlessly blend style, comfort, and functionality into your daily life. Setting up your new sofa is a breeze—no assembly required! Simply unpack, then allow the sofa to rest for approximately 72 hours as directed to let the cushions fully expand. Gently press the cushions together to shape the details, and watch as they regain their original, plump form, ready to elevate your home in no time.

Product

Crafted with "Designed for Life" philosophy, this luxurious sofa set features rounded edges and an elegant, inviting appearance that adds a touch of sophistication to any room. Its soft yet durable upholstery ensures long-lasting comfort, while the extra-wide seats provide ample space to stretch out and relax—whether you’re enjoying a movie night with family, hosting friends, or simply unwinding after a long day.

Product

Beyond its striking design, this sofa features innovative full compression technology, ensuring a hassle-free setup experience. Upon unpacking, the chair quickly unfolds and rebounds to its optimal shape in no time, eliminating the need for tedious assembly or waiting periods. The high-quality elastic materials used in its construction not only provide immediate support but also maintain their resilience over time, promising long-lasting durability without deformation – so you can enjoy its comfort for years to come.

Auch bei langem Sitzen oder Lehnen verformt er sich nicht leicht, sorgt für angenehme Entspannung und zuverlässige körperliche Unterstützung.

Taille und Nacken optimal. Der Sessel fördert eine natürliche Sitzhaltung und bietet selbst bei längerem Sitzen hervorragenden Komfort. Ideal fürs Lesen
Fernsehen oder Relaxen.

products.detailHtml:
Product

Indulge in ultimate relaxation with our premium Corduroy Relaxation Lounger, designed to transform your space into a haven of comfort and style.

Product

**No Assembly Hassle**
Say goodbye to complicated setup—this lounger arrives vacuum-packed in a single, convenient package with zero assembly required. Simply unbox, then let the foam fully expand undisturbed for 24 to 48 hours to restore its optimal shape. For faster results, gently tap each part to accelerate elasticity and fluffiness, ensuring you can sink into comfort in no time.

Es ist der perfekte Ort, um Filme zu genießen oder sich mit Familie oder Freunden zu entspannen.
